definition: A helper tool made by humans to do work.
exampleSentence: A vacuum is a machine that cleans floors.

definition: Helper tools that make work easier.
exampleSentence: Using a laptop is modern technology.

definition: A smart machine used to study and play.
exampleSentence: We play learning games on the computer.

definition: A machine that blows air to keep us cool.
exampleSentence: Turn on the ceiling fan when it is warm.

definition: A happy place where we learn and play.
exampleSentence: We use pencil sharpener tools at school.
